data.narrative:
Apex Space is a Series D-stage space and aerospace company founded by Ian Cinnamon and Max Benassi, currently valued above $1.0B post-money following $518M in total capital raised. The valuation assessment draws from an 8-company peer set of same-sector companies at comparable or adjacent stages, supplemented by public market anchors across 5 listed Space & Aerospace names.

Two quantitative methods are applicable. Stage-progression analysis applies a standard 1.5x step-up multiplier to the last post-money valuation of $1.0B, yielding $1.5B. Peer-median analysis across 8 same-sector private companies—including Astranis at $3.5B (Series D), ICEYE at $2.8B (Series E), and Varda Space Industries at $1.5B (Series C)—generates a median of $1.3B, with a range spanning $1.0B to $8.0B. Public-comp anchoring via P/S multiples is inapplicable due to absence of disclosed revenue figures. A public-market P/S median of 36.9x across Space & Aerospace tickers remains available as directional context only.

Triangulation of the two applicable methods supports a valuation range of $1.1B (low) to $1.7B (high), with a median of $1.4B. This range reflects stage-typical progression dynamics and peer-set positioning. Key uncertainties include revenue scale and trajectory relative to public comparables, market access maturity, and contract visibility—factors that would refine positioning within the derived band.
